full_text: Trumpelmann to Aqib Ilyas, Lbw!! Ruben Trumpelmann is on a hat-trick. What a dream start for him and Namibia. Another inswinging full delivery that smacks the boot as Aqib Ilyas was late in getting his bat down. He tried to jam, but the ball dips late with a hint of inswinging to catch him plumb in front of middle. Replays show that the ball would have gone to hit the base of middle stump.

full_text: Mehran Khan to Wiese, byes, 1 run, A length ball that bounces steeply outside off, Wiese tried to punch it away but the ball goes over his attempted shot. Difficult for the keeper to grab up to the stumps, and the ball lobs off his gloves to his left. The batters scamper for a bye and Wiese wanted to take a second run but Kruger wasn't aware of the situation. Bowler Mehran also didn't notice that Wiese was trying to sneak an extra run there, and had to be reminded by Maqsood to just whip the non striker's bails and dead the ball. We play on...
